pkgmetadata.longdescription: .. image httpstravis-ci.orgcrdoconnorxeger.svgbranchmaster target httpstravis-ci.orgcrdoconnorxegerXegerLibrary to generate random strings from regular expressions.To install, type pip install xegerTo use, type from xeger import Xeger x Xeger(limit10) default limit 10 x.xeger(json([0-9]+))ujson15062213AboutCode borrowed and cleaned up from the python modulerstr by Leap Frog Development httpjpmens.net20100426resty,in turn inspired by the Java library Xeger httpcode.google.compxeger.
